assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 9 shows the exact JQL: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. This matches the assertion — labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) and status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) are both present.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 17-18 describe inspecting 'issuelinks' for linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. Per-issue analysis shows: TC-9020 has TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 has TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 has no Depend links. All 3 candidates had their issuelinks checked and linked Task statuses fetched.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 32-37 show TC-9020 with Depend-linked Tasks TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed), assessed as 'ALL linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state' and result 'QUALIFIED -- Ready for QA'. discovery-listing.md line 43 confirms TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 48-51 show TC-9023 with TC-9025 (In Progress), result 'EXCLUDED -- remediation in progress', reason 'TC-9025 (In Progress) has not yet reached Done or Closed status'. discovery-listing.md line 51 confirms exclusion: 'TC-9023 | In Progress | CVE-2026-39102 | Remediation in progress -- TC-9025 is still In Progress'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 60-62 show TC-9026 with 'Depend-linked Tasks: (none)', result 'EXCLUDED -- no remediation to verify'. discovery-listing.md line 52 confirms: 'TC-9026 | Modified | CVE-2026-39330 | No linked Tasks with type "Depend" -- no remediation to verify'.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 42 shows the Ready for QA table header includes a 'Remediation Tasks' column. Line 43 populates it with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for the qualifying issue TC-9020.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue. discovery-listing.md line 45 states 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks have been completed.' ready-for-qa.md line 37 also states 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.'
